name: Mob Control
core_loop: Player aims a cannon to shoot units through multiplier gates to grow a massive army, defeats an enemy base, earns rewards, and uses them to upgrade their own base and unit cards.
audience_proxy: Male-skewing casual gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy satisfying, short-session strategy games.

palette.description: A vibrant and high-contrast palette with a dominant royal purple, complemented by a bright cyan and a warm yellow accent, creating an energetic and engaging feel.
